markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, performance, and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline Unblocked:** Theo will publish 28 pages (comparators, integrations, blogs) by EOW, prioritizing integration pages due to their high impact on partner backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [**FAQ Bug Fix:** A web agency bug is causing FAQs to display open by default. Victor will create an issue for a fix, while GrowthX will standardize their placement above related articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**New "Jump the Wave" Workflow:** A new Airtable will capture urgent topics (e.g., React vulnerabilities) for rapid content creation, enabling Strapi to capitalize on trending news.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [**Performance Reporting Shift:** GA4 data is too broad. Monthly reporting will now focus on HubSpot to isolate and measure the direct impact of GrowthX content.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Publishing

  - [**Blocker:** Theo was blocked from publishing 28 pages by a broken preview feature on comparator pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Victor advised publishing with a light review.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Comparator pages receive low traffic, and their large tables are being removed, making the preview issue a low priority.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**Video Update:** Add the "Getting Started with Strapi V5" video to all comparator pages as the default.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [**Exception:** Use more specific videos (e.g., the WordPress migration webinar) where a better fit exists.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)

### FAQ Bug & Placement

  - [**Problem:** FAQs on some pages are stuck open, despite the CMS toggle being set to "false."](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Cause:** A web agency bug, not a CMS configuration error.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**Action → Bug Fix:** Victor will create an issue for the web agency (Notum) to fix the bug.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Action → Placement Standard:** GrowthX will standardize FAQ placement *above* the related articles section.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This places the FAQ in the user's immediate reading flow, whereas related articles are primarily for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### Performance & Strategy

  - [**December Performance:** Off to a strong start.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
      - [**Traffic Spike:** The "BUN vs. Node.js" page saw a \~230% traffic increase, driven by news of BUN's acquisition by Anthropic.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
      - [**Conversion Events:** Increased WoW, with "Click on pricing link" and "Click on contact sales link" showing the most growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** Remains low at \~1k/week.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**Reporting Focus:** Shift from GA4 to HubSpot for monthly reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
      - [**Rationale:** GA4's last-touch attribution is too broad to isolate GrowthX's impact. HubSpot provides a clearer view of contacts created by GrowthX content.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [**Q1 Content Planning:** GrowthX will propose topics for new integration pages and content targeting the agency owner persona by mid-next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### New "Jump the Wave" Workflow

  - [**Problem:** Strapi cannot quickly create content for trending news (e.g., React security vulnerability).](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new workflow to capture and prioritize urgent topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** GrowthX will create an Airtable interface for Strapi to submit topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX drafts content → Strapi polishes internally → Heavy promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [**Future State:** This will be automated via an "agentic layer" in the Atlas platform, which is still under development.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)

### Administrative

  - [**Hotjar Access:** Victor will grant access to `team@growthxlabs.com` so the entire GrowthX team can use the tool.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**Strapi Contact Change:** GoalsR is no longer with Strapi. Victor is the new point of contact for all related topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Theo:**](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
      - [Publish the 28 pending pages by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
      - [Add the default "Getting Started with Strapi V5" video to comparator pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Victor:**](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [Create a web agency issue to fix the FAQ bug.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Grant Hotjar access to `team@growthxlabs.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [Standardize FAQ placement above related articles for all new content.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [Create the "Jump the Wave" Airtable interface for urgent topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
      - [Propose Q1 content topics by mid-next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
      - [Schedule a January session to review 2025 performance and define long-term topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/Az6Z4L-Y67exPJSJx-rg8minetK2cb-C?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
